description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named FBGEMM_GPU Release Build that triggers on push to main, pull requests to main, and manual dispatch. The workflow has two jobs: build_artifact and test_and_publish_artifact. The build_artifact job runs on a linux.12xlarge host, sets up the environment, installs dependencies, builds FBGEMM_GPU for multiple Python and CUDA versions, and uploads the built wheel as a GHA artifact. The test_and_publish_artifact job runs on a linux.g5.4xlarge.nvidia.gpu host, downloads the artifact, tests FBGEMM_GPU with PyTest, and pushes the binary to PyPI if the workflow is not triggered by a pull request or push and the CUDA version matches the specified publish version.
